question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

answer: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week.

assessment.note: Priya reported good energy but mentioned coasting this week, indicating a slight dip in engagement.

new_queue.label: Post-refactor energy
new_queue.name: Where is your energy at right now after the payments refactor, and what's influencing it?

new_queue.label: Recognizing contributions
new_queue.name: How do you feel the team's recognition of the payments refactor went, from your perspective?

new_queue.name: What would you want mentoring to look like if you started doing it here?

new_queue.name: What role do you see yourself playing in the upcoming billing rewrite?

new_queue.label: Support for new projects
new_queue.name: What kind of support do you need from me as new projects start to come into view?

new_queue.label: Current stretch
new_queue.name: What part of your work is stretching you the most right now?
